country.label: Country
country.hint: English country name, lowercase, hyphenated - exactly as it appears at https://feeds.meteoalarm.org/ (e.g. "bosnia-herzegovina").

province.label: Province
province.hint: Province/region name as it appears in that country's feed. This can't be fully verified here - MeteoAlarm only lists a region in the feed while it has an active alert, so during calm weather there's nothing to check against. Double-check the exact spelling at https://saratoga-weather.org/meteoalarm-map/ (EMMA_ID region explorer) if unsure.

language.label: Language
language.hint: ISO language code for alert text. Matched as a substring, so "da" also matches "da-DK". Leave as "en" for English.

error.fillBoth: Please fill in both country and province.
error.unrecognizedCountry: Unrecognized country "{{country}}" - check the spelling against feeds.meteoalarm.org.

info.matchFound: Match found - "{{areaDesc}}" currently has an active alert.
info.noActiveAlerts: Country recognized. No regions in {{country}} currently have an active alert, so the province name could not be double-checked - proceeding on your entry as-is.
info.noMatch: Country recognized, but "{{province}}" did not match any of the {{count}} region(s) with an active alert right now. This may just mean your region is calm - proceeding on your entry as-is.

suggestions.summary: {{count}} region(s) currently have an active alert in this country - tap one to use it
